components_analyzed.reason: Windows Server 2012 reached End of Extended Support on October 10, 2023. Microsoft no longer provides security updates, exposing the system to unpatched vulnerabilities.
The .NET Core version is not specified. Without knowing the exact version (e.g., 3.1, 5.0, 6.0, 8.0), lifecycle status cannot be determined. Version discovery is required.
IIS 8.0 is bundled with Windows Server 2012 and reached End of Life on October 10, 2023, together with Windows Server 2012.
SQL Server 2019 mainstream support ended January 7, 2025. It remains in Extended Support through January 8, 2030, but is no longer the current version (SQL Server 2022 is latest).
